meta.title: Cooperative Threat Reduction in the 21st Century
meta.description: Cooperative Threat Reduction (CTR) in today's world must address the complex challenges posed by weapons of mass destruction (WMD) to national security and global stability.  Effective CTR requires a network of diverse stakeholders to secure WMD-related materials, technologies, and knowledge; prevent their misuse; and reduce or mitigate the risks caused by their availability.  How do U.S. CTR programs and initiatives need to adapt to continue to be effective in the 21st century?  How should the
